videos.headline: San Diego State's Baylin Brooks fends off defender for great catch
videos.description: Baylin Brooks makes an impressive grab for San Diego State with a defender draped all over him.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (San Diego State's Baylin Brooks fends off defender for great catch) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Uiagalelei punches it in for an Oregon State TD
videos.description: Oregon State QB DJ Uiagalelei keeps it himself to convert at the goal line vs. San Diego State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Uiagalelei punches it in for an Oregon State TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaylon Armstead bursts into end zone for SDSU touchdown
videos.description: San Diego State cuts into Oregon State's lead as Jaylon Armstead punches in a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaylon Armstead bursts into end zone for SDSU touchdown) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Gould turns on the jets for 75-yard Oregon State TD
videos.description: Oregon State's DJ Uiagalelei throws a screen pass to Anthony Gould, who slices through the defense for an impressive touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Anthony Gould turns on the jets for 75-yard Oregon State TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon State picks off SDSU in the end zone
videos.description: Oregon State's Akili Arnold dives to intercept Jalen Mayden's pass in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon State picks off SDSU in the end zone) 2023/09/16 ESHEET
